Tests for the Pub/Sub Infrastructure ======================================== Te
set/get should store and retrieve values.
get on missing key should return None.
exists should return True for existing keys.
Publisher should deliver message to subscriber.
Multiple subscribers on same channel should all receive the message.
Messages on one channel should not leak to another.
Unsubscribed queue should stop receiving messages.
lpush/lrange should work as a list.
PubSubService should serialize messages as JSON with metadata.
get_telemetry_history should return raw telemetry events newest-first.
Tests for the Execution Agent's B2B restock + supplier-acknowledgement loop ====
Tests for schedule_supplier_acks (the async supplier ack loop).

Tests for the synthetic data generator.
Synthetic data directory should exist after generation.
events.csv should have the expected columns.
training_features.csv should contain the surge_label column.
Surge events should be approx 40-70% of total due to temporal expansion.
Model should load and have expected structure.
Tests for the runtime predictor service.
predict_surge should return risk_level, probability, model_used.
Risk level should be one of the expected values.
Low vs high density events must not return the same probability (feature contrac
Empty event should fall back to heuristic (not produce all-zeros ML output).
Tests for the Agent Pipeline =============================== Tests PerceptionAge
analyze() should return risk_level and assessment.
Risk level should be one of the expected values.
Low risk should result in MONITOR action.
High risk should result in DISPATCH or REROUTE action.
HIGH risk congestion events should trigger REROUTE_CROWD.
Critical risk should have P0 priority.
Every plan should include a reasoning string.
End-to-end tests for the full agent pipeline.
Full pipeline with low-risk event should return MONITOR.
Full pipeline with high-risk event should proceed to execution.
Action B — structured B2B restock orders.
